title: Dataset filters: standard score/source version selectors with explicit modes

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing standard selector-based dataset filters for /lab/datasets: segmented mode switch (All, By Score, By Source Version), reusable score/data source/data source version selectors, and strict index-backed query path selection.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented standard selector UX for /lab/datasets filters with explicit mode switch (All, By Score, By Source Version). Added reusable selectors: ScoreVersionSelector (listScoreVersionByScoreIdAndCreatedAt DESC), DataSourceSelector (listDataSourceByAccountIdAndName ASC, scaffold sources excluded), and DataSourceVersionSelector (listDataSourceVersionByDataSourceIdAndCreatedAt DESC). Removed raw version-ID text inputs from primary flow. Preserved strict single index-backed query path per mode (no multi-filter composition/fallback). Updated docs in associated-datasets and evaluate-score pages to describe selector-based filtering. Validation: npm --prefix dashboard run build:fast passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Landed in commit 9c9c42e20. Added explicit filter modes and standard selectors in /lab/datasets, removed raw version-ID entry in primary flow, and updated docs. build:fast green.
